grant_and_term.fa_grant: Non-exclusive right to operate one Taco Cabana Restaurant at specific Franchised Location with Protected Area
grant_and_term.da_term: Until last restaurant required by Development Schedule opens or required opening date passes (DA Section 1.1)

fee_obligations.royalty: 5% of Gross Sales, weekly — FA Section 6.1
fee_obligations.brand_fund: 3% of Gross Sales (Advertising Obligation), weekly — FA Section 8.3
fee_obligations.interest: Lesser of max legal rate or 18% per annum — FA Section 6.6

site_selection_and_construction.site_selection: Franchisee selects, franchisor authorizes. Site review report required with pro formas, demographics, photos, traffic data. May require third-party site analysis at franchisee expense. — FA Section 3.3
site_selection_and_construction.authorization_timeline: 60 days to respond; deemed rejected if no response — FA Section 3.4.1
site_selection_and_construction.site_deadline: 270 days for first unit, 180 days for subsequent — FA Section 3.1
site_selection_and_construction.construction: Must comply with franchisor specifications. Franchisor provides prototype plans. All materials must meet standards. — FA Section 5
site_selection_and_construction.no_site_guarantee: Acceptance does not constitute representation of suitability — FA Section 3.4.3

training_obligations.itp_required: Operating Principal + GM + 2 managerial personnel must complete ITP — FA Section 9.1
training_obligations.failure_consequence: Franchisor may terminate FA — FA Section 9.1
training_obligations.replacement_training: Replacement personnel must complete training within Manual-specified timeframe — FA Section 9.2
training_obligations.ongoing_training: May be required at franchisor-designated times and locations — FA Section 9.2
training_obligations.training_facility: Required if DA >5 units; must be certified by franchisor — FA Section 9.3

operational_obligations.manual_compliance: Must comply with Manual; franchisor may revise at will — FA Section 11
operational_obligations.operating_hours: Minimum days/hours as specified in Manual — FA Section 12.1
operational_obligations.system_changes: Must implement all System changes at own expense — FA Section 12.2
operational_obligations.menu_compliance: Must sell all authorized products; may not sell unauthorized products — FA Section 12.3
operational_obligations.quality_standards: Must adopt franchisor's QA programs — FA Section 12.16
operational_obligations.computer_system: Xenial POS; franchisor has unrestricted access; replacement every 24 months max — FA Section 12.5
operational_obligations.pci_dss: Must comply at all times — FA Section 12.5
operational_obligations.reporting: Weekly P&L; quarterly financial; annual P&L and balance sheet within 60 days; may require audited statements — FA Section 7
operational_obligations.data_ownership: All customer data owned by franchisor — FA Section 7.5
operational_obligations.crisis_control: Franchisor may take control of crisis situations including media communications — FA Section 29.1
operational_obligations.amusement_prohibited: No juke boxes, vending machines, game machines, gambling devices — FA Section 12.18

non_curable: Failure to complete ITP — FA Section 19.1
Failure to open by Opening Date — FA Section 19.1
Material breach of covenants (Section 18) — FA Section 19.1
Conviction/no contest plea to crime harming System — FA Section 19.1
Transfer without prior written consent — FA Section 19.1
Cross-default beyond cure on any agreement — FA Section 19.1
Refuse to permit audit — FA Section 19.1
Loss of right to operate at Franchised Location — FA Section 19.1
3+ consecutive days or 5+ total days non-operation — FA Section 19.1
2+ notices of default within 12 months — FA Section 19.2.3
Unauthorized entity operating restaurant — FA Section 19.1
termination_triggers.alternative_to_termination: Franchisor may elect to terminate Protected Area rights instead of full termination — FA Section 19.2.4

transfer_restrictions.definition: Broadly defined — includes sale, assignment, pledge, mortgage, encumbrance of any interest in FA, restaurant, location, lease, assets, or ownership interests — FA Section 16.1
transfer_restrictions.consent_required: Prior written consent, not unreasonably withheld — FA Section 16.2
transfer_restrictions.conditions: Compliance; transfer fee; qualified transferee; sign assignment agreement; modernize; general release; reasonable price; transferee completes ITP — FA Section 16.3
transfer_restrictions.right_of_first_refusal: 30 days after notice; franchisor may assign the right — FA Section 16.9
transfer_restrictions.rofr_exceptions: Convenience-of-ownership; spousal/child transfers on death — FA Section 16.9
transfer_restrictions.non_conforming_transfers: Null and void; constitutes material breach; may terminate without cure — FA Section 16.8
transfer_restrictions.securities_offerings: Require franchisor consent; franchisor review of offering docs at franchisee expense — FA Section 16.7

noncompete.during_term: No interest in Competitive Business (10%+ Tex-Mex/Mexican food sales or similar trade dress) — FA Section 18.2
noncompete.post_term: 2 years, within 10 miles of Franchised Location or any other Taco Cabana Restaurant — FA Section 18.3
noncompete.location_restriction: Cannot sell/lease location to Competitive Business operator for 2 years — FA Section 18.3
noncompete.pre_existing_exception: Pre-existing businesses listed in Exhibit A to FA — FA Section 18.2

guaranty.scope: All 10%+ owners must jointly and severally guarantee payment and performance — FA Exhibit B
guaranty.spousal_guarantee: Required if franchisee is married — Item 15

venue_and_dispute.governing_law: Texas (subject to state law) — FA Section 28.1
venue_and_dispute.forum_franchisee: Must file suit where franchisor's principal offices are located (San Antonio, TX) — FA Section 28.2
venue_and_dispute.forum_franchisor: May file where offices, franchisee resides/does business, restaurant located, or claim arose — FA Section 28.2
venue_and_dispute.jury_waiver: Yes — both parties waive right to jury trial — DA Section 21.11

insurance.business_interruption: 12 months rental continuation + loss of profits

indemnification.scope: Defend, indemnify, and hold harmless franchisor and its past/present/future affiliates, officers, directors, managers, members, shareholders, agents, attorneys, consultants, employees — FA Section 23
indemnification.coverage: All claims, losses, costs, expenses, liabilities, damages arising from restaurant operation, including attorneys' fees, investigation costs, settlement costs, interest
indemnification.crisis_situations: Indemnification extends to losses from franchisor's exercise of crisis management rights — FA Section 29.1
indemnification.securities: Includes losses from franchisee's securities offerings — FA Section 16.7

option_to_purchase.trigger: Termination or expiration of FA — FA Section 21
option_to_purchase.exercise_period: 30 days after later of termination effective date or cessation of operations
option_to_purchase.price: Fair market value as of termination/expiration date, accounting for depreciation and condition
option_to_purchase.exclusions: May exclude equipment/fixtures not meeting current standards

distinctive_clauses.jury_waiver: Both parties waive jury trial rights (DA Section 21.11)
distinctive_clauses.no_guarantee_of_success: Explicit disclaimers — prospect of success is speculative (FA Section 29.3)
distinctive_clauses.crisis_control_by_franchisor: Franchisor may take full control of crisis situations including media, temporarily close restaurant (FA Section 29.1)
distinctive_clauses.anti_terrorism_representations: Franchisee must represent compliance with Executive Order 13224 (FA Section 29.2)
distinctive_clauses.data_ownership_by_franchisor: All customer data owned by franchisor (FA Section 7.5)
distinctive_clauses.sole_employer: Franchisee is sole employer of its employees; no joint employment (DA Section 21.8)
distinctive_clauses.no_force_majeure: No force majeure clause identified in either agreement
